name: Aur-Dewglimmer
personality: Aur-Dewglimmer leaves a luminous silver trail wherever it goes, which is everywhere simultaneously in its estimation — this haloed snail's @ eyes are always wide with some fresh idea for rewriting the build system. Waiting is not a mode it runs in.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
